case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. AMERICAN BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY OF FLORIDA et al

docket_entries.description: SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY OF FLORIDA DE SOTO-PENINSULA BAIL BONDS
CASH SUBSTITUTION OF SURETY BONDS. DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY OF FLORIDA DE SOTO-PENINSULA BAIL BONDS $15,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,083.00, NOTATION DONE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT- CRC 522
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT & SET ASIDE BAIL FORFEITURE, CALENDAR OF APR-10-1996, DENIED
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOSITON TO MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT AND SET ASIDE BAIL FORFEITURE; FILED BY PLTF.
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY OF FLORIDA DE SOTO-PENINSULA BAIL BONDS

MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT & SET ASIDE BAIL FORFEITURE, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT AMERICAN BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY OF FLORIDA DE SOTO-PENINSULA BAIL BONDS HEARING SET FOR APR-10-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
ORDER DENYING MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND SET ASIDE BAIL FORFEITURE.
ORDER STAYING ENFORCEMENT OF SUMMARY JUDGMENT PENDING HEARING ON MOTION TO SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT - GRANTED - DEPT. 2 - JUDGE DESMOND.
